violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in food prep area (Tiles coming up and cracking) and ceilling tiles in emplyee bathroom noted need repair. | FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors under and around in place equipment noted in need of cleaning and ceiling around vents.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Toilet room door noted not self closing.
SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the dish machine.
THAWING POTENTIALLY HAZARDOUS FOOD (2 pts): Potentially hazardous foods (Meats) noted not being thawed using approved methods.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Hood above dish machine and above grills noted not clean.
